title: Xtra Light Saudi Arabian Mascarpone Flatbread
description: A funky and aerated Saudi Arabian dish featuring mascarpone, fry, and Mediterranean-friendly ingredients, perfect for a light meal or snack. This flatbread is a unique blend of flavors and textures.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add the softened mascarpone cheese to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and brush with olive oil.
Sprinkle garlic powder and dried oregano over the disks.
Place the disks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 12 minutes.
While the flatbreads are baking, toast the pita bread pieces until crispy.
Top each flatbread with a toasted pita bread piece, some cherry tomatoes, and a sprinkle of salt.
